title: 400 coined IR terms — 30 shortlist — 20 canon — 10 mini-theories

distinctive_mechanism: It narrows 400 terms to a 30-term shortlist, a 20-term canon, and 10 mini-theories, including Credibility Underwriting Gap, Ambiguity Rent, Sanction Saturation, Standards Entrenchment, Compellence Overdraft, Compliance Chokepoints, and Doctrine Lock-In.
